name: Kweisi Mfume
stanceSummary: Track AIPAC reports an Israel Lobby Total of $391,677 for Kweisi Mfume in U.S. House, MD-07. Public statements and congressional records indicate an Israel-focused security policy posture in recent conflict framing. This candidate has taken funding from the Israel lobby.

timeline.event: Track AIPAC congressional listing records Israel Lobby Total: $391,677.
